subcategory: cursor gradient particle trail with hue-shifting colors
use_cases: Add dynamic cursor trail effects to landing pages and hero sections
Create interactive particle effects following mouse movement for portfolio sites
Enhance product showcase pages with colorful, animated cursor feedback
Build engaging visual experiences for creative agency landing pages
ai_summary: A cursor gradient particle effect component that tracks mouse movement and generates colorful particles with hue-shifting gradients based on cursor position. Features smooth animations via framer-motion, creating an interactive and visually engaging feedback experience. The particles fade out over time and are constrained to a maximum of 30 active particles for performance. Ideal for creative landing pages, portfolios, and interactive showcases.
